name: Not Drunk Yet!
description: Not Drunk YET! . . . is a puzzle / race game. Collect all the beers in 10 different levels. Dodge all the obstacles, and dont get zaped! Set your personal best time in all levels! Made by Nitram1234 (M. Martin) Made in the Unity 2020.3.17f1 version Thanks For Playing!
instructions: Move - W A S D Collect beer - ON CONTACT Pause Game - Escape 0
